stemHtml: Multi-engine aircraft 50 NM from departure at FL120. Engine failure, must divert, but 15,000 kg over max landing mass. Airport elevation 2000 ft. What should ATC do for fuel dumping?

options.a: Hold at present position and dump immediately.
options.c: Vector to an area at minimum 6000 ft AMSL or 2000 ft AGL, clear of traffic.
options.d: Clear to any area clear of traffic regardless of altitude.
